comments.text: Taj Mahal is the very best.  The Grand Canyon is stupendous.  The largest church in the world isn't St Peters; it's the Basilica of Our Lady of Peace in Yamoussoukro, Côte d’Ivoire (Ivory Coast).  And why not La Sagrada Familia?

comments.author: @ronaldcarlson8572
comments.text: I would like to visit a lot of the attractions in Europe like St. Peter's Basilica and other impressive structures. But cannot believe the Grand Canyon is not on the list. Hollywood and the walk of fame is a joke, and it is pretty run down with homeless everywhere. This list doesn't seem completely accurate if you do A.I. search, since you don't have the Empire State Building, Eiffel Tower, the Pyramids in Egypt, but don't believe anyone knows for sure how many people actually visit certain sites around the world.
